name: Silver Lake
overview: Among the largest tech-specialist private equity firms globally. Focus on large-cap technology buyouts and structured equity, often complex take-privates and partnership transactions with founders or strategics. Multi-strategy with growth alongside flagship buyout.
notable: Long history of large-cap, complex technology transactions
bdNotes: Large-cap focus means BD is often relationship-led with C-suites of public companies and major sponsors rather than thematic outbound to LMM founders.
